feedback.text: Hello there, Digital fairness and End-user property after payment is important. Companies do not need to support their games indefinitely, as long as they enable a way for the users themselves to support the game. Furthermore Digital fairness should also extend to net neutrality which is currently also being compromised by creditcard companies who are trying to exert control of a consumer's right to buy legal services. This should not be allowed. Thank you for processing this feedback.
